title: Classic Portuguese Lasagna
description: A delicious fusion of Portuguese and Italian flavors in a layered lasagna dish.

ingredients.name: Portuguese cheese blend (Queijo de Cabra, Queijo de Serra, Queijo de Azeiteira)
Salt and black pepper, to taste

instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Cook the lasagna noodles according to package instructions until al dente. Drain and set aside.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat. Add the sliced sausage and cook until browned, about 5 minutes. Remove from heat and set aside.
In the same skillet, add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 3-4 minutes. Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the cooked sausage, onion mixture, and chopped parsley. Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
In a separate saucepan, prepare the Bechamel sauce according to your recipe or package instructions.
In a 9x13-inch baking dish, create a layer of lasagna noodles. Spread a layer of Bechamel sauce on top of the noodles, followed by a layer of the sausage mixture. Sprinkle with shredded cheese.
Repeat the layers two more times, ending with a layer of cheese on top.
Cook the lasagna in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove from the oven and let it rest for 10-15 minutes before slicing and serving.
